message:
fix(search): bypass BM25 for empty queries and show date-sorted results (#79)

Empty queries now use a dedicated browse_by_date() path that queries
SQLite directly with ORDER BY created_at, eliminating meaningless BM25
scores that caused stale/random result ordering.

- Add browse_by_date() and browse_by_date_sqlite() to SearchClient
- Route empty queries through date-sorted browse instead of BM25
- Add per-agent-type result quotas to prevent monopolization
- Re-fetch results when ranking mode cycles (date sort direction matters)
- Trigger initial search on startup so TUI populates immediately
- Update tests for new empty-query behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
